channel.title: GitHub Rich Text Format Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Rich Text Format in GitHub

item.title: cncf/foundation
item.description: ☁️♮🏛 This repo contains several documents related to the operation of the CNCF. File non-technical issues related to CNCF here.

item.title: Open-Source-Compliance/Sharing-creates-value
item.description: This repo realizes the idea that OSS compliance activities will be less expensive by applying OSS principles

item.title: ckeditor/ckeditor5
item.description: Powerful rich text editor framework with a modular architecture, modern integrations, and features like collaborative editing.
